calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elaine Ercolini, Esq., counsel for Charles Greenbaum and Mark Greenbaum, Co-Trustees (appearing by video conferencing); Kim Gasson, Esq., guardian ad litem (appearing by video conferencing).

After brief discussion with counsel and confirmation of the appropriateness of the Petition by Ms. Gasson, the Court grants the petition modifying the trust.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Continued To Aug-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elaine Ercolini appeared by telephone for and with Stanley (Charles) Greenbaum (by telephone) and for and with Mark Greenbaum (by telephone) (Co-Trustees).

The Court stated that it reviewed the petition, expressed concern about the contingent beneficiaries, stated that it believes a Guardian Ad Litem is needed and referred to Roth v. Jelley 45 cal app 5th 655. Ms. Ercolini refereed to Probate Code 15403, stated that the Court has discretion to limit the class of beneficiaries who have consented, that the Trustor is 91, that they listed the two children and the grandchildren, and that it is very unlikely that any other beneficiaries will take. The Court provided Ms. Ercolini with the option of going forward with a Guardian Ad Litem, or providing further briefing in support of her petition. Ms. Ercolini stated that she will file an ex parte petition for appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem. The Petition to Modify Trust is continued to August 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court orders that a Guardian Ad Litem be appointed for the contingent beneficiaries.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
